biography: Olli, a familiar face at the Hector Trophée, is known for his strategic play and unwavering determination. Representing Hirsala Golf, Olli has graced this tournament on nine occasions, securing one coveted Hector Trophée victory and one Victor Trophy to his name. While he may not be competing in the upcoming Hector Trophée 2026, his presence is surely missed.

Beyond the greens, Olli is known for his intense focus and meticulous preparation. His admiration for Bryson Dechambeau is well-known among his peers, and he often applies similar analytical approaches to his own game. Olli's dedication and passion for golf are evident both on and off the course.
